---
title: 任务运行情况
description: 此接口用于获取云采集监控平台中任务和子任务运行数量情况。
---

# 任务运行情况

> **所需套餐：** 企业版

## 端点

```
https://openapi.bazhuayu.com/cloudextraction/task/stats
```

## 描述

此接口用于获取云采集监控平台中任务和子任务运行数量情况。

## 请求头

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|------|
| `Authorization` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `身份令牌   Content-Type` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` | application/json  字段 | 是 | 描述 |
| `Authorization` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `身份令牌   Content-Type` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` | application/json  字段 | 是 | 描述 |
| `Authorization` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `身份令牌   Content-Type` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` | application/json | 是 |  |


**请求头示例**

```json
{
    "Authorization":"Bearer eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6ImdXS3hWc0F4SHhaMDlDcWh6NkNJb3ciLCJ0eXAiOiJhdCtqd3QifQ..ARhbBfzI1xS6yo-Ue1CFHzMaUIfzw4gJlubNBOkUT4SSTlhuS4bVQ4t4UHuYGbE9VX6XgNVgkcDnx6XapqcPohSy7vPv9TIAsjtbrQSA3mj13SnVVAPWwfAVJ-I7g9HDnyPEEOVSvmZUJhiz-irH5L0ojbnt3ck2rQ9tIFuSd7j2eh5BS4ItjNoHY00rh_QPZltk66a9q-fNE33GrxOaXUdHH47WMlsENnh1gybB7QtGtd6bZ982Qa9JljpFnZWSdEf4VfkN4JmhkUTTC908DqS3stT-LD-9tpztFwB54sd0D4CyOBnESkKrUwjxchYYZo4l1O7auiZVGV48YhZYMw"
    "Content-Type":"application/json"
}
{
    "Authorization":"Bearer eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6ImdXS3hWc0F4SHhaMDlDcWh6NkNJb3ciLCJ0eXAiOiJhdCtqd3QifQ..ARhbBfzI1xS6yo-Ue1CFHzMaUIfzw4gJlubNBOkUT4SSTlhuS4bVQ4t4UHuYGbE9VX6XgNVgkcDnx6XapqcPohSy7vPv9TIAsjtbrQSA3mj13SnVVAPWwfAVJ-I7g9HDnyPEEOVSvmZUJhiz-irH5L0ojbnt3ck2rQ9tIFuSd7j2eh5BS4ItjNoHY00rh_QPZltk66a9q-fNE33GrxOaXUdHH47WMlsENnh1gybB7QtGtd6bZ982Qa9JljpFnZWSdEf4VfkN4JmhkUTTC908DqS3stT-LD-9tpztFwB54sd0D4CyOBnESkKrUwjxchYYZo4l1O7auiZVGV48YhZYMw"
    "Content-Type":"application/json"
}
字段	类型	描述
taskIds
required
	String[]	

任务Id列表

{
    "Authorization":"Bearer eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6ImdXS3hWc0F4SHhaMDlDcWh6NkNJb3ciLCJ0eXAiOiJhdCtqd3QifQ..ARhbBfzI1xS6yo-Ue1CFHzMaUIfzw4gJlubNBOkUT4SSTlhuS4bVQ4t4UHuYGbE9VX6XgNVgkcDnx6XapqcPohSy7vPv9TIAsjtbrQSA3mj13SnVVAPWwfAVJ-I7g9HDnyPEEOVSvmZUJhiz-irH5L0ojbnt3ck2rQ9tIFuSd7j2eh5BS4ItjNoHY00rh_QPZltk66a9q-fNE33GrxOaXUdHH47WMlsENnh1gybB7QtGtd6bZ982Qa9JljpFnZWSdEf4VfkN4JmhkUTTC908DqS3stT-LD-9tpztFwB54sd0D4CyOBnESkKrUwjxchYYZo4l1O7auiZVGV48YhZYMw"
    "Content-Type":"application/json"
}
字段	类型	描述
taskIds
required
	String[]	

任务Id列表
```

**请求体示例**

```json
https://openapi.bazhuayu.com/cloudextraction/task/stats
{
    "taskIds": [
        "a3b9bdf7-9aaa-22f6-9ccf-b32790f6df8f",
        "86b9bdf7-9aaa-22236-9ccf-b3279469df01"
    ]
}
{
    "taskIds": [
        "a3b9bdf7-9aaa-22f6-9ccf-b32790f6df8f",
        "86b9bdf7-9aaa-22236-9ccf-b3279469df01"
    ]
}
```

## 响应

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|------|
| `data` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `响应数据` |  | 否 |  |
| `ExtractingCount` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `采集中任务数` |  | 否 |  |
| `WaitingCount` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `等待中任务数` |  | 否 |  |
| `FinishedCount` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `已完成任务数` |  | 否 |  |
| `WaitingSubTaskCount` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `采集中子任务数` |  | 否 |  |
| `ExecutingSubTaskCount` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `等待中子任务数` |  | 否 |  |
| `requestId` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `请求Id  字段` | 描述 | 否 |  |
| `data` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `响应数据` |  | 否 |  |
| `taskId` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `任务Id` |  | 否 |  |
| `taskName` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `任务名` |  | 否 |  |
| `status` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` | 任务状态：Unexecuted - 未执行，Waiting - 等待分配，Extracting - 采集中，Stopped - 已停止，Finished - 已完成 | 是 |  |
| `requestId` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `请求Id  字段` | 描述 | 否 |  |
| `data` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `响应数据` |  | 否 |  |
| `taskId` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `任务Id` |  | 否 |  |
| `status` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` | 任务状态：Unexecuted - 未执行，Waiting - 等待分配，Extracting - 采集中，Stopped - 已停止，Finished - 已完成 | 是 |  |
| `currentTotalExtractCount` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `此次采集数据量` |  | 否 |  |
| `executedTimes` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `执行次数` |  | 否 |  |
| `subTaskCount` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `子任务数` |  | 否 |  |
| `nextExecuteTime` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `下次执行时间` |  | 否 |  |
| `startExecuteTime` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `任务启动时间` |  | 否 |  |
| `ExecutingTime` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `任务开始执行时间` |  | 否 |  |
| `endExecuteTime` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `任务结束时间` |  | 否 |  |
| `startExecuteTimeSeconds` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` | 任务采集花费时间(秒) | 是 |  |
| `requestId` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `请求Id` |  | 否 |  |


**响应示例**

```json
{
    "data": {
        "extractingCount": 0,
        "waitingCount": 0,
        "finishedCount": 0,
        "waitingSubTaskCount": 0,
        "executingSubTaskCount": 6
    },
    "requestId": "0HNDERFQAC2G9:00000001"
}
{
    "data": [
        {
            "taskId": "a3b9bdf7-9aaa-22f6-9ccf-b32790f6df8f",
            "taskName": "八爪鱼采集",
            "status": "Extracting"
        },
        {
            "taskId": "86b9bdf7-9aaa-22236-9ccf-b3279469df01",
            "taskName": "八爪鱼采集2",
            "status": "Stopped"
        }
    ],
    "requestId": "0HMD469L0I8R0:00000001"
}
{
    "data": [
        {
            "taskId": "a3b9bdf7-9aaa-22f6-9ccf-b32790f6df8f",
            "status": "Extracting",
            "currentTotalExtractCount": 0,
            "executedTimes": 1,
            "subTaskCount": 1,
            "nextExecuteTime": "2018-04-04T20:34:20.973",
            "endExecuteTime": "2018-04-04T18:34:20.973",
            "startExecuteTime": "2018-04-04T18:34:20.973"
        }
    ],
    "requestId": "0HMD469L0I8R0:00000001"
}
```

## 错误响应

| 参数 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|------|
| `requestId` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `请求Id` |  | 否 |  |
| `error` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` | 错误信息，参考错误码 | 是 |  |
| `code` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` | 字段 | 是 | 描述 |
| `requestId` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `请求Id` |  | 否 |  |
| `error` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` | 错误信息，参考错误码 | 是 |  |
| `code` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` | 字段 | 是 | 描述 |
| `requestId` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |
| `请求Id` |  | 否 |  |
| `error` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` | 错误信息，参考错误码 | 是 |  |
| `code` |  | 否 |  |
| `required` |  | 是 |  |


**错误示例**

```json
message
required
	String	

错误描述

{
    "error": {
        "code": "ServerError",
        "message": "Internal Server Error"
    },
    "requestId": "0HMD469L0I8R0:00000001"
}
批量获取任务状态
1.0.0 

此接口接收用户传入的一批任务ID，返回相应的任务状态列表。调用频率：5秒1次请求。

https://openapi.bazhuayu.com/cloudextraction/statuses

权限: 旗舰+，企业版，团队版



message
required
	String	

错误描述

{
    "error": {
        "code": "ServerError",
        "message": "Internal Server Error"
    },
    "requestId": "0HMD469L0I8R0:00000001"
}
批量获取任务状态V2
1.0.0 

此接口接收用户传入的一批任务ID，返回相应的任务状态列表。调用频率：1秒5次请求。

https://openapi.bazhuayu.com/cloudextraction/statuses/v2

权限: 旗舰+，企业版，团队版



message
required
	String	

错误描述

{
    "error": {
        "code": "ServerError",
        "message": "Internal Server Error"
    },
    "requestId": "0HMD469L0I8R0:00000001"
}
批量
```
